Headline: Closure - Diseworth Church of England Primary School (State), Leicestershire
Info: Governors have voted to close Diseworth Church of England Primary School at the end of the current academic year following a significant loss of staff, leaving the school without teachers for the upcoming term.

Headline: Merger - Highclare School, Birmingham
Info: Highclare School has announced the closure of its Woodfield preparatory site in Wylde Green, merging it with its St Paul's site in Sutton Coldfield over the next 18 months, with the introduction of VAT on fees cited as a key factor.

Headline: Closure - Rendcomb College, Gloucestershire
Info: Rendcomb College, an independent day and boarding school established in 1920, has confirmed it will permanently close at the end of the academic year, blaming the introduction of a VAT levy on private schools and rising costs.

Headline: Merger - Catholic Primary Schools and St Richard Gwyn High School (State), Flintshire
Info: Flintshire County Council and the Diocese of Wrexham have relaunched a statutory consultation to close three Catholic primary schools and one high school, replacing them with a £55 million 3-18 Catholic super-school.

Headline: Closure - St Gerard's School, Bangor
Info: St Gerard's School, a historic independent school in North Wales, has announced its permanent closure at the end of the current term due to sustained financial pressures, including the introduction of VAT on fees and the loss of charitable status.

Headline: Closure - Heathside Prep School, Hampstead
Info: Governors at the independent Heathside Prep School have confirmed it will close at the end of the summer term after dwindling pupil numbers made the school financially unviable.

Headline: Closure - St Joseph's School, Reading
Info: The Catholic independent school is under serious threat of shutting its doors on 10 July due to declining pupil numbers and operational costs, leaving parents and staff fighting to secure its future.

Headline: Merger - Soho Parish Primary School (State), Westminster
Info: A legal challenge has been launched by a parent governor over their exclusion from a key meeting regarding the potential merger of Soho Parish Primary School, which is facing serious financial challenges due to falling pupil rolls.

Headline: Merger - Saltney Ferry Community Primary School (State), Flintshire
Info: Flintshire County Council has reopened a statutory consultation into controversial plans to close Saltney Ferry Community Primary School and merge it with Saltney Wood Memorial Primary School.

Headline: Merger - St Gabriel's School, Newbury
Info: St Gabriel's School has announced it will join the Mill Hill Education Group in a charitable merger, allowing the independent day school to gain long-term financial stability while retaining its identity.

Headline: Merger - Abingdon School and The Manor Prep, Oxfordshire
Info: Abingdon School has officially joined forces with Abingdon Prep School and The Manor Prep to form the Abingdon Schools Group, a merger aimed at consolidating their educational offering.
